title: jasminum annamense
intro: Jasminum annamense, also known as the Annam jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to Vietnam and southern China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum annamense include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Jasminum annamense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
